summary: Searches an ordered collection for a target and returns the earliest zero-based position among adjacent equivalent matches, or -1 when no suitable match exists.
signature_intent: Accepts a target value, an ordered collection, a comparison callback, and an optional search-bias mode; returns a numeric index.
behavior: Returns -1 when the collection is empty.
Uses the provided comparison callback to locate a suitable position according to the requested bias.
Uses a greatest-lower-bound style bias when no bias is supplied.
Returns -1 when the search finds no suitable position.
If a suitable position is found, moves to the first adjacent item considered equivalent by the comparison callback.
Returns the earliest equivalent index as a zero-based number.
edge_cases: Missing bias uses the default lower-bound behavior.
Multiple adjacent equivalent items return the first such position.
forbidden_details: Do not mention implementation variable names.
Do not mention source locations or repository identity.
Do not include incidental formatting or comment details.
